recent_posts.title: Computer Vision for Robotics: Giving Robots the Gift of Sight
recent_posts.short_description: Discover how computer vision gives robots 'eyes' to see and understand their world. Learn basics, applications, and start coding with OpenCV.

recent_posts.title: Humanoid Robots & AI: The Future Walking Among Us
recent_posts.short_description: Dive into the world of humanoid robots and AI! Discover Boston Dynamics' Atlas, Tesla Optimus, and the future of bipedal robots.

recent_posts.title: Autonomous Vehicles: Driving the Future of Robotics & AI
recent_posts.short_description: Dive into autonomous vehicles! Discover how self-driving cars work with LiDAR, sensor fusion, and AI. A guide for young robotics enthusiasts.
